headline: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
summary: NASA launched an emergency mission to save its Swift Observatory. The 20-year-old satellite is at risk of crashing to Earth due to solar storms. Katalyst Space Technologies' Link spacecraft aims to intercept and boost its orbit.

headline: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
summary: The US Department of Energy deleted ~6,000 pages on energy conservation. This occurred amidst a historic US heatwave. It follows Republican criticism of AC temperature recommendations.

headline: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
summary: The popular Matic robot vacuum will see a significant price increase. Its cost will jump by $250 to $1,495 on September 9th. The company states the new price reflects production costs.

headline: Flatbush Zombies’ Erick the Architect misses his BlackBerry keyboard
summary: Erick the Architect, from Flatbush Zombies, shared his unexpected tech nostalgia. The renowned producer misses the physical keyboard of his old BlackBerry. Despite global tours and collaborations, the device holds a special place.

headline: Exclusive: First Details and Trailer Revealed for BEYOND BORDERS Vol.1: EMERGE MODE MIKU, a New EP Featuring Hatsune Miku Singing With Grimes, slayr, and More
summary: IGN reveals BEYOND BORDERS Vol.1: EMERGE MODE MIKU, a new EP. Virtual singer Hatsune Miku will collaborate with artists like Grimes. First details and a trailer for the project have been exclusively released.

headline: Solo Leveling: Beyond the System Movie Announced at Anime Expo
summary: A Solo Leveling movie, "Beyond the System," has been announced. The full-length adaptation will continue the anime series' story. The announcement took place at Anime Expo.

headline: Young Washington Review
summary: "Young Washington" is reviewed as an ambitious but flawed exploration. It covers George Washington's early years during the French & Indian War. The film offers a storybook interpretation but leaves deeper exploration wanting.

headline: First Look at Ghost of Tsushima Legends Anime Character Art
summary: New anime character art for "Ghost of Tsushima Legends" has been revealed. The first look offers a fresh artistic take on the game's characters. Details hint at an exciting visual direction for the franchise.

headline: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
summary: The US celebrated its 250th birthday with various festivities. Events included fireworks, flyovers, and President Trump's speech. Celebrations were marked by concurrent extreme weather conditions.

headline: Tuchel praises respectful Mexico fans amid increased security
summary: Thomas Tuchel lauded Mexican football fans for their respect. He dismissed security concerns for England's team in Mexico. Tuchel found the atmosphere "nicer than expected" and fans "friendly."

headline: Farage denies rules broken after reports benefits from ally were not declared
summary: Nigel Farage denies allegations of undeclared benefits from an ally. The Sunday Times reported he failed to register support from a convicted individual. The Reform UK leader maintains no rules were broken.

headline: Watch: Lyse Doucet in Tehran as huge funeral for Iran's former supreme leader takes place
summary: Lyse Doucet reports from Tehran on a massive funeral underway. Ceremonies are held for Iran's former supreme leader. Up to 20 million people are expected to attend across Iran and Iraq.
